intended_use: The Assert-IQ™ ICM system is intended to help physicians monitor, diagnose, and document the rhythm in patients who are susceptible to cardiac arrhythmias and unexplained symptoms by detecting arrhyth
intended_use_full: The Assert-IQ™ ICM system is intended to help physicians monitor, diagnose, and document the rhythm in patients who are susceptible to cardiac arrhythmias and unexplained symptoms by detecting arrhythmias and transmitting data for review.
target_condition: Atrial fibrillation and cardiac pauses in patients with unexplained cardiac symptoms or arrhythmia risk
ground_truth: For CARE-Pause and CARE-AF retrospective studies: device-detected episodes classified by algorithm. For prospective post-market study (NCT06172699): Holter monitor assessment (up to 7 days per patient) comparing Assert-IQ ICM AF detection.
other_metrics: CARE-Pause: episode-based relative sensitivity 99.2%, false positive reduction 90.6%, patient sensitivity 100%, no delay in diagnosis. CARE-AF: episode-based relative sensitivity 97.3%, false positive reduction 81.0%, consistent performance across patient subgroups. Prospective post-market study (NCT06172699): CARE-AF overall system achieved episode-based sensitivity 99.4%, positive predictive value 93.6%, patient sensitivity 100%, no delay in diagnosis (151 patients enrolled, 135 analyzable).
